hero.cta: I want to be a BETA tester

demo.description: See how Ethra's AI analyzes your colors, tries on clothes and creates looks for you
demo.tabColorimetryDesc: See how AI analyzes skin tone, eyes and hair to reveal your ideal colors
demo.tabTryOnDesc: Select a garment and see how it looks on you with generative AI
demo.tabClosetDesc: Select real pieces, organize your closet and watch AI create looks combining your pieces
demo.cta1: I want this on my profile
demo.cta3: I'm convinced! Let me try it

chromatic.selectProfile: Select a profile for AI color analysis
chromatic.explanationLight: Your warm undertone with rosy nuances harmonizes perfectly with soft, luminous shades. Vivid yet delicate colors enhance your naturally radiant skin.
chromatic.explanationMedium: Your deep golden undertone is enhanced by earthy, warm tones. Rich colors from nature create a sophisticated harmony with your luminous skin.
chromatic.explanationDark: Your deep, radiant skin creates stunning contrast with intense, saturated colors. Vibrant jewel tones are your greatest allies.
chromatic.ctaDiscover: Discover my real palette with my photo
chromatic.placeholder: Tap a profile to see the full AI analysis

tryOn.selectGarment: Choose a garment to try on virtually
tryOn.placeholder: Select a garment above to see the virtual try-on in action

closet.selectPieces: Select pieces to build your capsule wardrobe
closet.capsuleExplainer: A capsule wardrobe brings together versatile pieces that mix and match — fewer clothes, more looks.

signup.headline: Secure your
signup.description: Fill in your details and be one of the first to experience Ethra
signup.submitButton: I want to be a BETA tester
signup.bottomNote: Limited spots • Lifetime premium access for testers
signup.validationNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
signup.validationPasswordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
signup.consentRequiredDesc: Accept the terms and confirm your age to continue.
signup.errorAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please log in.
signup.successDescription: Your registration is confirmed! Our team will reach out to you soon. As a tester, you'll have full access to the premium plan.
signup.successNote: Testers have lifetime access to all Ethra premium features.
signup.emailVerificationDesc: We sent a confirmation link to your email. Click it to activate your account and start exploring.

trust.noCardDesc: To get started, we ask for nothing

features.subtitle: Four pillars to transform your relationship with fashion
features.smartClosetDesc: Organize your entire wardrobe digitally. Categorize, favorite and find pieces in seconds.
features.colorimetryDesc: Discover your chromatic season and the colors that best enhance your skin tone.
features.virtualTryOnDesc: Try on clothes virtually before buying. AI that shows you how it will look.
features.luggageDesc: Organize your luggage based on climate and occasions. Never pack unnecessary pieces again.

personas.subtitle: Whatever your lifestyle, we have the right tools for you
personas.professionalDesc: Needs executive looks that impress effortlessly
personas.travelerDesc: Wants practical and versatile luggage for any destination
personas.fashionistaDesc: Seeks inspiration and wants to try new combinations
personas.minimalistDesc: Values an efficient and functional wardrobe

pricing.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you want. No surprises, no fine print.

testimonials.subtitle: See what our users say about their experience with Ethra
testimonials.quote1: I used to spend hours every morning thinking about what to wear. Now in 2 minutes I already have an outfit that matches my skin tone.
testimonials.quote2: Colorimetry completely changed my shopping. I stopped buying pieces that looked 'weird' and now everything matches.
testimonials.quote3: The virtual try-on saved me from at least 3 wrong purchases this month. Already paid for the subscription easily.
testimonials.quote4: I started on the free plan, did the 7-day trial and never left. The smart travel packing is genius.
testimonials.quote5: My closet was a total mess. In one week I organized everything digitally and discovered combinations I never imagined.
testimonials.quote6: I was always afraid to be bold with my style. Ethra showed me I can be creative and still look professional.

specialOffer.description: Access 50 pieces in closet, 10 virtual try-ons per day and 3 avatars. No commitment, cancel anytime.
specialOffer.noCardNote: No credit card needed. After 7 days, you return to the free plan automatically.

ctaSection.badge: Still in doubt? Try 7 days free
ctaSection.subtitle: Join 12,000+ people who have already transformed their relationship with fashion

heroMain.trialBadge: 7 days free of the Trendsetter plan
heroMain.subtitle: Your intelligent digital wardrobe. Discover your colors, create perfect outfits and travel in style.
heroMain.noCardNote: No credit card needed. Join 12,000+ people.
